creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dr. Markus Waldeck wrote:

Hello,

You should not just file a PR out of the blue with
this information, perhaps it is better to just ask
to the mailinglist to see what happened with the
PR's instead of submitting new entries over and
over again and therefor filling up the logs.

You only risk that you are not being helped with those
things.

So, i will close the PR; please contact either
the freebsd-www mailinglist or contact the gnats-admins
to see what happened, if people think this is worth a PR
for that, get back to me and I will reopen it with the
most recent information included.

Thanks.

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
